subject: Handle pap update messages
commit_message:
Handle pap update messages

Addressing feedback from previos review.

Issue-ID: POLICY-1608
Change-Id: I8e36c99b13a3eb81c72515c039e86aa9e32e6f14
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/763/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/763/ )

Patch failed to compile in component feature-lifecycle: Compilation failure ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/763/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/763

Patch Set 2:

Docker build is failing .. weird :

Patch Set 2:

If it happens again, send helpdesk ticket. They are moving docker builds into docker repos and phasing out nexus.onap.org. Maybe a config issue? Hopefully just a glitch.

Patch Set 2:

I see, thanks for the heads up Pam.
